textByHash.191312e2125c128c3bc1e74c493c8a50be0bb494: Hey! Get your hands off there!
textByHash.50fef295c55f6ccb4aecbb5a2e432fc2f6176b9e: The Master Farmers usually carry a few rare seeds around with them, although I don't know if they'd want to part with them for any price to be honest.
textByHash.bb8a164a3321aa6f8a12fe948ec2e940b594a61a: You're the one who stole something from me!
textByHash.d0b9b2e18b89ef62cb99f01ff5a75ca6b26b41ec: Would you like to trade in seeds?
